Obtains an {@link AudioCapturer} instance. This method uses an asynchronous callback to return the capturer instance.
注释信息: @param { AsyncCallback<AudioCapturer> } callback - Callback used to return the audio capturer instance.

parameters.说明: Callback used to return the audio capturer instance.

节点.功能描述: Obtains an {@link AudioCapturer} instance. This method uses a promise to return the capturer instance.
注释信息: @returns { Promise<AudioCapturer> } Promise used to return the audio capturer instance.
节点.return_description: Promise used to return the audio capturer instance.

节点.功能描述: Obtains an {@link AudioRenderer} instance. This method uses an asynchronous callback to return the renderer instance.

parameters.说明: Callback used to return the audio renderer instance.

节点.return_description: Promise used to return the audio renderer instance.

节点.功能描述: Obtains a {@link TonePlayer} instance. This method uses an asynchronous callback to return the renderer instance.

节点.功能描述: Wired headset, which is a combination of a pair of earpieces and a microphone.
Bluetooth device using the synchronous connection oriented link (SCO).
Bluetooth device using advanced audio distribution profile (A2DP).
Device type for rerouting audio to other remote devices by system application
Bluetooth device using the SCO link.
Enumerates the available device types for communication.
Accessibility usage, such as screen reader.
System usage, such as screen lock or key click.
Enforced tone usage, such as camera shutter.
Ultrasonic playing usage. This type is only used for msdp condition.
Voice call assistant type. This type is only used for call assistant functionalities.
Enumerates the audio interrupt request type.
Default type to request audio interrupt.
Enumerates volume related operations. Flags should be powers of 2!
Enumerates audio stream privacy type for playback capture.
Privacy type that stream can be captured by third party applications.
Privacy type that stream can not be captured.
